ddls:
CREATE TABLE "hardware_settings" (
  "setting_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each hardware setting */,
  "address" TEXT /* Address of the setting */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the setting */,
  "field" TEXT /* Field related to the setting */,
  "bit" INTEGER /* Bit position of the setting */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the setting */,
  "category_id" INTEGER /* ID of the category related to the setting */,
  "product_id" INTEGER /* ID of the product related to the setting */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp for when the setting was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp for when the setting was last updated */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Flag to indicate if the setting is currently active */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("setting_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_hardware_settings_category_id FOREIGN KEY ("category_id") REFERENCES setting_categories ("category_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_hardware_settings_product_id FOREIGN KEY ("product_id") REFERENCES products ("product_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "setting_categories" (
  "category_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each category */,
  "category_name" TEXT /* Name of the category */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the category */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("category_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "products" (
  "product_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each product */,
  "product_name" TEXT /* Name of the product */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the product */,
  "category_id" INTEGER /* ID of the category related to the product */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp for when the product was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp for when the product was last updated */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Flag to indicate if the product is currently active */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("product_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_products_category_id FOREIGN KEY ("category_id") REFERENCES setting_categories ("category_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "error_flags" (
  "error_flag_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each error flag */,
  "setting_id" INTEGER /* ID of the setting related to the error flag */,
  "error_flag" INTEGER /* Value of the error flag (0 or 1) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the error flag */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp for when the error flag was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp for when the error flag was last updated */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Flag to indicate if the error flag is currently active */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("error_flag_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_error_flags_setting_id FOREIGN KEY ("setting_id") REFERENCES hardware_settings ("setting_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "setting_versions" (
  "version_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each version */,
  "setting_id" INTEGER /* ID of the setting related to the version */,
  "version_number" INTEGER /* Version number of the setting */,
  "version_date" TEXT /* Date the version was created */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created the version */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Flag to indicate if the version is currently active */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("version_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_setting_versions_setting_id FOREIGN KEY ("setting_id") REFERENCES hardware_settings ("setting_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_setting_versions_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "error_flag_versions" (
  "version_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each version */,
  "error_flag_id" INTEGER /* ID of the error flag related to the version */,
  "version_number" INTEGER /* Version number of the error flag */,
  "version_date" TEXT /* Date the version was created */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created the version */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Flag to indicate if the version is currently active */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("version_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_error_flag_versions_error_flag_id FOREIGN KEY ("error_flag_id") REFERENCES error_flags ("error_flag_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_error_flag_versions_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., engineer, technician, admin) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp for when the user account was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp for when the user account was last updated */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Flag to indicate if the user account is currently active */,
  "department" TEXT /* Department the user belongs to */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the user */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the setting */,
  "setting_id" INTEGER /* ID of the setting being accessed */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the setting was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, edit) */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address from which the access was made */,
  "user_agent" TEXT /* User agent string of the device used for access */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_access_logs_setting_id FOREIGN KEY ("setting_id") REFERENCES hardware_settings ("setting_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "product_settings" (
  "product_setting_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each product setting */,
  "product_id" INTEGER /* ID of the product related to the setting */,
  "setting_id" INTEGER /* ID of the setting */,
  "value" TEXT /* Value of the setting for the product */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp for when the product setting was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp for when the product setting was last updated */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Flag to indicate if the product setting is currently active */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("product_setting_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_product_settings_setting_id FOREIGN KEY ("setting_id") REFERENCES hardware_settings ("setting_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_product_settings_product_id FOREIGN KEY ("product_id") REFERENCES products ("product_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "image_settings" (
  "image_setting_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each image setting */,
  "setting_id" INTEGER /* ID of the setting related to the image setting */,
  "pixel_number" INTEGER /* Pixel number */,
  "total_bytes_hi" INTEGER /* Total bytes high */,
  "total_bytes_lo" INTEGER /* Total bytes low */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp for when the image setting was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp for when the image setting was last updated */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Flag to indicate if the image setting is currently active */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("image_setting_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_image_settings_setting_id FOREIGN KEY ("setting_id") REFERENCES hardware_settings ("setting_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "transmission_settings" (
  "transmission_setting_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each transmission setting */,
  "setting_id" INTEGER /* ID of the setting related to the transmission setting */,
  "byte_per_packet" INTEGER /* Bytes per packet */,
  "packet_para" INTEGER /* Packet parameter */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp for when the transmission setting was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp for when the transmission setting was last updated */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Flag to indicate if the transmission setting is currently active */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("transmission_setting_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_transmission_settings_setting_id FOREIGN KEY ("setting_id") REFERENCES hardware_settings ("setting_id")
)
